name: Separator

parameters.name: Decorative
parameters.description: When true (the default), the separator is purely visual and exposes role="none" with no orientation — assistive tech skips it, matching Radix's decorative default. Set to false for a semantic separator that conveys structure (e.g. between menu groups or list sections): the element then carries role="separator" plus an aria-orientation matching Orientation. The implicit ARIA orientation of a separator is horizontal, so a vertical one must declare it explicitly.

parameters.name: Inset
parameters.description: When true, the rule is inset from the container edges (a 0.75rem margin on the long axis: mx-3 when horizontal, my-3 when vertical) instead of spanning the full length — the Material / MudBlazor "inset divider" look, softer than an edge-to-edge line. Default false.

examples.title: Horizontal
examples.code:
<Stack Gap="1">
    <Heading Level="4" Size="sm" Weight="medium" Class="leading-none">Lumeo UI</Heading>
    <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">An open-source component library for Blazor.</Lumeo.Text>
</Stack>
<Separator Class="my-4" />
<Flex Gap="4" Align="center" Class="h-5 text-sm">
    <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm">Docs</Lumeo.Text>
    <Separator Orientation="Lumeo.Orientation.Vertical" />
    <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm">Source</Lumeo.Text>
    <Separator Orientation="Lumeo.Orientation.Vertical" />
    <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm">Blog</Lumeo.Text>
</Flex>

examples.title: In a Card
examples.code:
<Card>
    <CardContent Class="pt-4">
        <Stack Gap="3">
            <Flex Align="center" Justify="between" Class="text-sm">
                <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm" Color="muted">Subtotal</Lumeo.Text>
                <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm" Weight="medium">$89.00</Lumeo.Text>
            </Flex>
            <Flex Align="center" Justify="between" Class="text-sm">
                <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm" Color="muted">Shipping</Lumeo.Text>
                <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm" Weight="medium">$4.99</Lumeo.Text>
            </Flex>
            <Separator />
            <Flex Align="center" Justify="between" Class="text-sm font-semibold">
                <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm" Weight="semibold">Total</Lumeo.Text>
                <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm" Weight="semibold">$93.99</Lumeo.Text>
            </Flex>
        </Stack>
    </CardContent>
</Card>

examples.title: Vertical
examples.code:
<Flex Gap="4" Align="center" Class="h-5 text-sm">
    <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm">Home</Lumeo.Text>
    <Separator Orientation="Lumeo.Orientation.Vertical" />
    <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm">Components</Lumeo.Text>
    <Separator Orientation="Lumeo.Orientation.Vertical" />
    <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm">Themes</Lumeo.Text>
    <Separator Orientation="Lumeo.Orientation.Vertical" />
    <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm">GitHub</Lumeo.Text>
</Flex>

mdSummary:
# Separator

Horizontal or vertical dividing rule.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/separator

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Separator | Orientation | `Lumeo.Orientation` | `Lumeo.Orientation.Horizontal` |  |
| Separator | Decorative | `bool` | `true` | When true (the default), the separator is purely visual and exposes role="none" with no orientation — assistive tech skips it, matching Radix's decorative default. Set to false for a semantic separator that conveys structure (e.g. between menu groups or list sections): the element then carries role="separator" plus an aria-orientation matching Orientation. The implicit ARIA orientation of a separator is horizontal, so a vertical one must declare it explicitly. |
| Separator | Inset | `bool` | `` | When true, the rule is inset from the container edges (a 0.75rem margin on the long axis: mx-3 when horizontal, my-3 when vertical) instead of spanning the full length — the Material / MudBlazor "inset divider" look, softer than an edge-to-edge line. Default false. |
| Separator | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Separator | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Separator | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Separator) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Separator />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/Separator/Separator.razor`
